---
title: "Plants"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr); library(knitr); library(kableExtra); library(DT)

sp_list <- read.csv(here::here("../LaSelva-MetaNetwork-data/data/L1/L1_harmonized_names/plant_sp_list.csv"))

template <- readLines("templates/species_template.qmd")

dir.create("species", showWarnings = FALSE)

species <- unique(sp_list$species)

for(sp in species){

  sp_file <- gsub(" ", "_", sp)

  content <- template |>
    gsub("\\{\\{species\\}\\}", sp, x = _) |>
    gsub("\\{\\{taxa\\}\\}", "plant", x = _) |>
    gsub("\\{\\{index_page\\}\\}", "plants", x = _)

  writeLines(
    content,
    file.path("species", paste0(sp_file, ".qmd"))
  )
}

df <- sp_list %>%
  arrange(order, family, species) %>%
  distinct(order, family, species) %>%
  mutate(
    species_link = paste0(
      "<a href='species/",
      gsub(" ", "_", species),
      ".html'>",
      species,
      "</a>"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(order, family, species = species_link)

datatable(
  df,
  escape = FALSE,
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top",
  extensions = "RowGroup",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 50,
    rowGroup = list(dataSrc = 0),  # group by first column (order)
    columnDefs = list(
      list(visible = FALSE, targets = 0) # hide order column
    )
  )
)

```
